en.name: Pure Pork Sausage 500g
en.shortDescription: Pure Pork Sausage 500g — traditional northeast Chinese smoked sausage. Ready-to-eat.
en.description: Pure Pork Sausage 500g is a premium Chinese agricultural product sourced from Heilongjiang, Harbin. Carefully selected, quality-controlled, and packaged for export. Suitable for wholesale distribution, food service, and retail.
